([Thai](/wiki/Thai_language "Thai language"): ปิงโค้ง) is a *[tambon](/wiki/Tambon "Tambon")* (subdistrict) of [Chiang Dao District](/wiki/Chiang_Dao_District "Chiang Dao District"), in [Chiang Mai Province](/wiki/Chiang_Mai_Province "Chiang Mai Province"), [Thailand](/wiki/Thailand "Thailand"). In 2020, it had a total population of 14,007 people.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

**Ping Khong** ([Thai](/wiki/Thai_language "Thai language"): ปิงโค้ง) is a *[tambon](/wiki/Tambon "Tambon")* (subdistrict) of [Chiang Dao District](/wiki/Chiang_Dao_District "Chiang Dao District"), in [Chiang Mai Province](/wiki/Chiang_Mai_Province "Chiang Mai Province"), [Thailand](/wiki/Thailand "Thailand"). In 2020, it had a total population of 14,007 people.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ping_Khong&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

The subdistrict was created effective August 1, 1979 by splitting off 5 administrative villages from [Mueang Ngai](/wiki/Mueang_Ngai "Mueang Ngai").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ping_Khong&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Administration")]

### Central administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ping_Khong&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Central administration")]

The *tambon* is subdivided into 16 administrative villages (*[muban](/wiki/Muban "Muban")*).

| No. | Name | Thai |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 01. | Ban On | บ้านออน |
| 02. | Ban Pang Fueang | บ้านปางเฟือง |

### Local administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Ping_Khong&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Local administration")]

The whole area of the subdistrict is covered by the subdistrict municipality (*[Thesaban Tambon](/wiki/Thesaban#Subdistrict_municipality "Thesaban")*) Ping Khong (เทศบาลตำบลปิงโค้ง).
